name: WordPress Content Pipeline — Claude writes, publishes, tracks in Sheets
description: Uses Claude AI to generate blog content on a given topic, publishes the post to WordPress, and logs the publication details to Google Sheets for tracking.

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for tracking

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for publish notifications

wordpressSiteId.description: WordPress site ID or domain (e.g. mysite.wordpress.com)

spreadsheetUrl.description: Google Sheets URL to log published posts (columns: Date, Title, URL, Status, WordCount)

topic.description: Blog post topic or keyword to write about

wordCount.description: Target word count for the blog post

steps.name: Build Claude prompt to generate blog post
Run Claude AI to write blog post
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Prepare row data for Google Sheets tracking
Log published post to Google Sheets
Build Slack Block Kit publish notification
